passives.name: Mender
passives.description: Heal skills restore 1 additional HP per CHA modifier point above the base.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal dice + CHA damage to a single enemy.

skills.name: Cleanse
skills.description: Remove CHA modifier stacks from debuffs (oldest first) from ceil(dice_sum / 2) allies.

skills.name: Heal
skills.description: Restore dice + CHA HP to the ally with the lowest current HP.
